privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a department named 'Product Management' with 'Tina Williamson' as manager in Odoo 17 Community Edition running at http://localhost:8069 with admin credentials admin/admin. Tina Williamson is confirmed to exist in Odoo's official demo data (bundled in hr/data/hr_demo.xml) as one of 20 employees. The demo data includes 7 departments and is the official Odoo sample dataset. All environment credentials and URLs have been verified against setup scripts (setup_odoo.sh, task_utils.sh, setup_data.py).
